name: Pastel Style (SD 2.1 — Historical)
description: Feb 2023 Platdiffusion/SD 2.1 pastel style LoRA. HISTORICAL — predates standardized metadata. dim 96/alpha 12 (1:8 ratio), UNet 2x TE LR, 512px. WARNING: SD 2.1 not in model type enum — needs v2=true and OpenCLIP ViT-H. Use SD1.5 slot as workaround.
